creator: phk@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for a comprehensive and well documented PR. 

I have just committed a fix to -current, you should be 
able to apply the same fix to 4.0-stable: 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/netinet/udp_usrreq.c.diff?r1=1.73&r2=1.74&f=u
